item.title: About me
item.author: jycc267@gmail.com (Jimmy Chien)
item.description: What I’m doing 😎 Hi folks! I’m a graduate student pursuing a MS Degree in Computer Science and Public Policy (MSCAPP) at the University of Chicago. With a focus at the intersection of software engineering and internet governance, I am studying how to create innovative and impactful software solutions that facilitate better digital infrastructure and human-computer/data interaction. My current niche is to learn knowledge from the core fields of high performance computing, including distributed system, parallel programming, cloud computing; and attain the skills to design large-scale, human-in-the-loop system applications and services for end-users.
